headline: Fastenal Expands Southeast Footprint With New Tech Focused Georgia Hub
summary: Fastenal (NasdaqGS:FAST) announced plans to build a major new distribution and logistics center in the Southeast U.S. The facility, to be located in Georgia, will incorporate advanced warehousing technology and expand regional operational capacity. The project is intended to strengthen Fastenal's supply chain reach and support customers across the Southeast over the long term. Fastenal, a large distributor of industrial and construction supplies, relies heavily on efficient logistics to...
